description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named mingw-native that runs on every push to any branch, on every pull request to any branch, and on a scheduled basis on Wednesday and Saturday at 00:16. Use a single windows-2022 job that checks the GCC version, checks out the repository, sets up Python 3.x, installs Conan, installs Boost 1.72.0, configures a CMake build with MinGW Makefiles, builds the project in parallel, and runs tests with CTest.
